scope: TG-P9.0 primitive backlog for pure generated 8B decode attention

primitives.evidence: generated route launches ceildiv(MAXC,L)=36 splits regardless of ctx; tile ctx-flat (1.05x) vs owned ctx-proportional (3.67x). owned scales per-split length to live Tc (per=ceildiv(Tc,S)).
primitives.capability: fixed S splits (occupancy) + runtime per-split length per=ceildiv(Tc,S); split covers [s*per, min(Tc,(s+1)*per)); union = [0,Tc) exactly once; symbolic inner loop bound nb=ceildiv(per,TK).
primitives.reduces: ctx512 tile block-work from ~MAXC/TK (288 blocks) to ~Tc/TK (~36 blocks at ctx512); no change at ctx4096.

primitives.evidence: generated 3-kernel gmax+combine lifecycle = 556us/fwd (83% of the ctx4096 attention delta) vs owned's fused 224us; BINDING cap at ctx4096.
primitives.capability: reduce the combine lifecycle cost WITHOUT collapsing Hq*S partial parallelism or Hq*Hd combine parallelism; a split-preserving two-stage or d-sharded generated combine.

primitives.evidence: decode_attention_owned_two_kernel is external handwritten HIP/AMDGCN; allowed only as rollback/oracle.

promotion_bar: >=98% of owned at ctx512 AND ctx4096, token/logit equivalent, route-bound, rollback to owned, BoltBeam policy update, strict default purity pass
